history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: This image shows a dark-themed game-style “LEVEL UP!” status panel with an avatar on the left and multiple progress statistics in the center.

The main focus is a rectangular, rounded-corner interface panel with a circular profile image/avatar on the left and level and experience progress information across the middle.

The setting is entirely a digital UI screen with a dark navy and purple background, featuring a centered panel and a top heading. Lighting is uniform and flat like a dashboard, with bright accent colors for headings and progress values.

Visual Details:
At the top center of the screen, the text “LEVEL UP!” appears in a gold/yellow color with small decorative diamond shapes on either side. Beneath it, a large rounded rectangle panel spans most of the width.
On the left side inside the panel is a circular avatar image showing anime-style characters and many small UI-like elements inside the circle; the circle has a purple ring outline. Next to the avatar, in the upper left area of the panel, there is the text “iky” in white, and below it “LEVEL PROGRESS” in smaller text.
In the middle are two large rounded rectangles: one purple box labeled “LEVEL” with a big number “4” beneath it, and one teal/green box labeled “EXPERIENCE” with “2 / 250” beneath it.
Below these, there is a long dark progress bar area, and to the right of it the number “0%” appears.
Further down are three smaller rounded boxes aligned horizontally: one labeled “MESSAGES” with “100” beneath it, a second labeled “XP NEEDED” with “248” beneath it, and a third labeled “NEXT LVL” with “5” beneath it.
Near the bottom center of the panel, faint text reads “Congratulations on leveling up!” in very light/gray.
The overall composition is centered with generous padding and a clean, card-like layout.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
iky
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
4
EXPERIENCE
2 / 250
0%
MESSAGES
100
XP NEEDED
248
NEXT LVL
5
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
The image is a game interface screen announcing a level-up and displaying current level and experience progress. It also shows message count, remaining XP needed, and the next level number in separate UI boxes.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
